text:
Once upon a time, in a tiny pond nestled deep within the heart of a woodland, there lived a butterfly named Ruby. Ruby was unlike any other butterfly. She had dreams that bubbled beneath her wings like tiny springs. Every morning before dawn she would drift to a favorite feather pillow near a whispering willow tree.

One morning, instead of usual dreams, Ruby dreamed big. She dreamed of soaring above ancient forests, visiting towns she'd only fantasized about. With determination, she spun her dreams into threads.

She fluttered between petals until she found a kindly old spider who delighted in tales. Ruby spun her most enchanting story yet, one about friends traveling through the stars. The spider listened enthralled.

Weeks turned into months, and Ruby's story caught the hearts of birds and mice. She had woven dreams she could fly towards. One day, a mysterious owl fluttered down beside her clutch of stories. She beckoned it with her gaze.

The owl hooted
